files_modified: src/ (source-headers stamp — many files, preserveExisting:true skips already-stamped)
downstream_consumers: RAG index (consumes source-headers for semantic enrichment)

risks.title: source-headers stamp may overwrite hand-curated fields
risks.mitigation: Use --source-headers without --overwrite-headers for phase 1 (fills gaps only, preserves existing)

risks.title: rag-search-constraint test requires live RAG index
risks.mitigation: Instance 1 (dispatch-009) is rebuilding the index with Ollama — coordinate or test against existing sqlite store

risks.title: what-imports-fix changes may break test suite
risks.mitigation: Run npx vitest run after any scanner fix

decision_records.rationale: preserveExisting:true — only fills missing headers, does not re-stamp already-defined ones

decision_records.decision: Phase 5 RAG constraint test uses existing sqlite index if Ollama rebuild incomplete
decision_records.rationale: Coordination boundary — Instance 1 owns the Ollama rebuild; this instance tests what is available
